<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\HttpClient\Internal; /** * Internal representation of the native client's state. * * @author Alexander M. Turek <me@derrabus.de> * * @internal */ final class NativeClientState extends ClientState { public int $id; public int $maxHostConnections = \PHP_INT_MAX; public int $responseCount = 0; /** @var string[] */ public array $dnsCache = []; public bool $sleep = false; /** @var int[] */ public array $hosts = []; public function __construct() { $this->id = random_int(\PHP_INT_MIN, \PHP_INT_MAX); } public function reset(): void { $this->responseCount = 0; $this->dnsCache = []; $this->hosts = []; } }
